title: Global Custom View Across All Boards
excerpt:

posts.author: DigitalWithMike (Mike Alnaji)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have a variety of boards that my teams use on a daily basis and I am wondering if there is a way for me to build custom views for each preset Team on Monday.com that creates views based on the person assigned. I know the “My Work” feature exists, however, I’d like to preset what this looks like in essence for each Team to make things more efficient for them.

Is this something that is doable? How can I go about it?

Thanks,
Mike

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Mike,

Hm if I am understanding correctly you can create a custom default view (utilising our board views feature) based on specific filters/sorts/settings in each of the boards - i.e. a view based on which person is assigned? Does this sound like it could help?

posts.author: DigitalWithMike (Mike Alnaji)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Bianca,

Thanks so much for sharing this suggestion. This would work on a board level and I’m actually utilizing this, however, I’d like to create a view across all boards based on items assigned to each team/person.
